title: fix(apps): restore Polli-com for @abhi5hek1979 to APPS.md
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: The lost flower returns
gist.blurb: We found a missing app in the garden! Polli-com by @abhi5hek1979 has been officially restored to the showcase, and their Flower tier status is blooming once again.
gist.summary: Restored the Polli-com app by @abhi5hek1979 to the community showcase after it was accidentally omitted during a previous update.
gist.impact: The app is now properly listed in the directory, and the creator's Flower tier status has been rightfully restored.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee finding a lost flower (representing the 'Flower' tier and the app) and planting it back into a lime green pot. Represents restoring a community member's status and app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot carefully planting a glowing digital flower back into a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot carefully planting a glowing digital flower back into a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
